speaking_hub.title: SPEAKING ROOM
speaking_hub.description: Practice real conversations with AI tutors and get instant feedback on your pronunciation, fluency, grammar, and content.
speaking_hub.page_description: Practice your speaking skills with AI-powered conversations and get instant feedback.

history.no_sessions_desc: Complete a speaking session to see your history

bookmarks.empty_desc: Click the bookmark icon on any topic card to save it here for quick access.

custom.create_desc: Design your own speaking scenario for personalized practice
custom.free_talk_desc: Talk about anything you like — no topic restrictions
custom.create_scenario_desc: Generate a scenario from your description
custom.surprise_me_desc: Get a random scenario based on your level
custom.no_scenarios: You haven't created any custom scenarios yet.

preparation.desc_read_aloud: Read the AI suggestions aloud — scored on accuracy, completeness, and pronunciation.
preparation.desc_free_speaking: Speak freely using AI hints as reference — scored on accuracy, fluency, and prosody.

active.finish_confirm: Are you sure you want to finish this conversation?
active.tap_mic_speak: Tap mic to speak · Lightbulb for hints

analyzing.title: Analyzing Your Session...
analyzing.desc: AI is reviewing your conversation, checking grammar, and calculating your scores. Please wait.
analyzing.loading_desc: Retrieving your pronunciation and content assessment results.
